title: glycosmis triphylla var. angustifolia
intro: Glycosmis triphylla var. angustifolia, also known as the Indian plum or three-leaved glycosmis, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Glycosmis triphylla var. angustifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
